message:
refactor: migrate panic! to unreachable! in test match arms and unwrap() to expect() with descriptive messages

Applies two idiomatic Rust improvements across test modules:

- n_version_oracle: replace 4 panic!("expected blocked verdict") calls with
  unreachable!() in test match arms where the branch should never be reached
  if the test assertion logic is correct
- atc_participation_weighting: replace 4 unwrap() calls with expect() providing
  context about what serialization/deserialization step failed
- atc_reciprocity: replace 2 unwrap() calls with expect() in JSONL export tests
- repro_bundle_export: replace 3 unwrap() calls with expect() in JSON
  serialization round-trip tests
- proof_scheduler: migrate panic!/unwrap patterns to unreachable!/expect()
  across scheduling and priority queue tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
